name: BMR Calculator (Mifflin-St Jeor)
description: Calculate BMR using Mifflin-St Jeor formula.
seo_description: Use our free bmr calculator (mifflin-st jeor) to quickly estimate bmr based on weight, height, age. No registration needed.
result_context: Mifflin-St Jeor es The equation more validada clínicamente; precisión ±10% to población general.
formula_display: Hombre: BMR = 10 × weight + 6.25 × height - 5 × edad + 5; Mujer: BMR = 10 × weight + 6.25 × height - 5 × edad - 161
steps: The calculador aplica The formula automatically and muestra results
mistakes: No Verify que weight estén in units correctas antes of Calculate
Redondear values intermedios antes of the calculation final (pierde precisión)
Apply results without Consider contexto individual or condiciones especiales
desc: Free online bmr calculator (mifflin-st jeor). Enter weight and height to get instant results.
